# dependencytrack_licenses (Data Source)

Retrieves the concise list of all licenses known to Dependency-Track (built-in and custom).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Retrieve the concise list of all licenses known to Dependency-Track
data "dependencytrack_licenses" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier of this data source result (always `licenses`).
- `licenses` (Attributes List) List of licenses (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--licenses))

<a id="nestedatt--licenses"></a>
### Nested Schema for `licenses`

Read-Only:

- `fsf_libre` (Boolean) Whether the license is considered libre by the Free Software Foundation
- `license_id` (String) The SPDX-style license ID
- `name` (String) The name of the license
- `osi_approved` (Boolean) Whether the license is approved by the Open Source Initiative
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the license
